title: schleich 42542 Horse Club Sarah and Mystery Horse Figurine Set - Horse Toy Playset with Removable Saddle and Bridle, Fully Movable Rider Figurine, Adventurous Fun for Boys and Girlsfor Kids Ages 5+
features: A WILD WEST SPARK OF CURIOSITY AND IMAGINATION - Our schleich horses are detailed and realistic: this set includes a Sarah rider figurine, a stunning Arabian mare toy horse, and a removable saddle and bridle. Our horse toys for girls and boys are designed to inspire and educate toddlers and kids about animals.

INTRODUCE KIDS TO THE FUN AND FANCY WORLD OF HORSES - Sophia's Beauties horses offer a fun twist with interchangeable manes and tails. It's a perfect kids play horse, encouraging creative pretend play as a standalone toy or as part of a larger collection.

GIVE CHILDREN THE GIFT OF MAGIC AND WONDER - Features multicoloured hairclips and beads for a range of accessorised looks. It's a great horse gifts for girls and boys idea, expanding their creativity and imaginative adventures to new frontiers.

GENERATIONS OF IMAGINATION FOR KIDS OF ALL AGES - Long-lasting, super durable and highly detailed horse toys for kids from schleich are the perfect way to ignite your child's imagination and fun. With a huge catalogue of fairies, monsters, characters, dinosaurs, and animals across a variety of playsets and figurines, you can be sure that your child will experience all the magic and wonder of childhood while making memories for years to come.

WHERE STORIES BEGIN - Our characters come in a million gazillion shapes, sizes, and colours. Whether they have two legs, four legs, or no legs, they have one thing in common – every toy in our collection, including our toy horses for girls and boys, is authentic, detailed, and high quality.
description: Product Description HORSE CLUB Sarah & Mystery from schleich HORSE CLUB doesn't bring anything apart. When Sarah gallops across wide fields with her Arabian mare, wades through streams or roams through the forest, the two of them are one heart and one soul. The girl figure Sarah wears a riding helmet, is fully mobile and can therefore put the bridle and reins on her horse and sit in the saddle and ride. With the pretty yellow bracelet, Sarah shows that she is one of the members of the HORSE CLUB. Safety Warning Warning Swallowable small parts. Choking hazard.
